MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. REES BOYD-FARREL OF THE FARLEY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 559-738-5975 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-COMPLAINANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. JERRY R. HAUSER OF THE MILLERHAUSER LLP, TEL. NO. 354-0131 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; CROSS DEFENDANTS WHITEHEAD & PORTER, LLP AND STEPHEN L. PORTER'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS NOT PLEADED EITHER A BREACH OF THE DUTY OF CARE OR ANY NON-SPECULATIVE CONNECTION TO THE ALLEGED INJURY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J.
